name: Safety Goggles
description: Protects eyes during lab investigations.

name: Lab Gloves
description: Protects hands and prevents contamination.

name: Beaker
description: Used for measuring and mixing safe virtual samples.

name: pH Indicator
description: Changes colour to suggest acidic, neutral, or basic conditions.

name: Unknown Liquid
description: A fictional classroom sample for virtual pH testing.

name: Filter Paper
description: Used to separate mixtures in a filtration test.

name: Water Sample
description: A sample used in water cycle and filtration missions.

name: Microscope Lens
description: Used to observe cells more clearly.

name: Microscope Slide
description: Holds a virtual sample for viewing.

name: Plant Sample
description: A safe virtual biological sample.

name: Cell Card
description: Represents the basic unit of life.

name: DNA Piece
description: Represents genetic information.

name: Battery
description: Provides energy in circuit experiments.

name: Wire
description: Connects circuit components.

name: Bulb
description: Lights up when the circuit is complete.

name: Magnet
description: Attracts certain metal materials.

name: Soil Sample
description: Used in absorption and environmental science tests.

name: Weather Data Card
description: Records temperature, rainfall, and climate clues.

name: Energy Cell
description: Represents energy transfer in virtual experiments.

name: Hazard Symbol
description: Unsafe item. Avoid it during dash missions.
